code: import api from"./axiosInstance";;const BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL;export const addSensor=async payload=>{const response=await api.post(`${BASE_URL}/api/Sensors`,{connectionId:payload.connectionId,sensorName:payload.sensorName,quantity:payload.quantity,unit:payload.unit,topicName:payload.topicName,locatedAt:payload.location});return response.data;};
